description: Configure Chrome for a freelance medical localization workflow (English to Spanish) using the specification at ~/Desktop/localization_spec.txt. Organize 18 professional bookmarks into folders named 'CAT & Platforms', 'Medical Terminology', and 'Dictionaries & Reference', and remove all personal bookmarks. Add custom search engines with keywords 'proz' and 'ling'. Configure Chrome to support Spanish, enable bilingual spellcheck for English and Spanish, and disable the 'Offer to translate pages' feature globally. Download the .tmx and .pdf project assets from the local server tab to ~/Documents/Project_Alpha/.
